title: Pedra en Viu — performing arts showcase
location: Pedra Viva festival venues (Ciutadella and other towns)
description: A showcase day within the Pedra Viva festival: multiple short performances of theatre, circus, dance and music in singular spaces across the island, most at 5 € (some free) with a 30 € day pass. The festival asks for absolute silence during performances, and not every show is family-oriented. On the 30th, a free professional day at Es Pinaret.
